Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
Laboratory results are largely within normal limits. Notable findings include mildly decreased total CO₂, which may suggest mild metabolic acidosis or compensated respiratory alkalosis, and low HDL cholesterol, which is a cardiovascular risk factor. Renal function, glycemic control, and lipid profile are otherwise unremarkable. Clinical correlation is recommended.
